title: atropis paupercula
intro: Atropis paupercula, also known as lesser wormwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The medicinal properties of Atropis paupercula include its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant to clear mucus from the lungs. Herbal preparations of Atropis paupercula typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or salves for topical application.
